title: Realistic Villagers
description: Changes all the villagers to have biome specific and profession specific textures. The clothes have been made less flashy and more realistic.
body:
Changes all the villagers to have biome specific and profession specific textures. The clothes have been made less flashy and more realistic.

They retain their "bald" buzzcut look while as a child and unassigned to a workstation, otherwise they will have the clothing and facial hair of that profession.
Illagers have been color muted and changed too.

All villager-like mobs now have custom human like sounds to match the textures.



Fresh Animations patch available as alternate download. Requires both Fresh Animations and Realistic Villagers to work.
